title: PrimeTier Tagger
description: Display player's PvP Tiers in their nametag! (PrimeTiers and McTiers and Subtiers)
body:
# PrimeTier Tagger Official tier display mod for PrimeTiers --- ## Features - **HUD Tier Display** – Displays player tiers directly above nametags. - **PrimeTiers Integration** – Fetches and displays live player rankings from PrimeTiers along With Mc Tiers and Sub Tiers. - **Automatic Gamemode Detection** – Automatically detects the current gamemode and displays relevant rankings. - **Player Search** – View player tiers, peaks, regions, points, global rankings, and skin information. - **Multi-Gamemode Support** – Supports Sword, Crystal, Netherite, Potion, Mace, UHC, Axe, SMP, and more. - **Highest Tier Detection** – Automatically displays a player's highest available tier. - **Display Modes** – Choose between selected gamemode, adaptive highest, or absolute highest rankings. - **Custom Layouts** – Configure displayed gamemodes and their positions. - **Custom Styling** – Customize icons, colors, and visual presets. - **Region Support** – Displays player region information alongside rankings. - **Smart Caching** – Reduces API requests with an optimized caching system. - **Real-Time Updates** – Keeps ranking information up to date automatically. - **Resource Pack Compatible** – Icons and textures can be customized through resource packs. - **Lightweight & Optimized** – Designed for minimal performance impact. - **Configurable** – Extensive customization options available through the configuration screen. ## ShowCase
## Requirements - Minecraft 1.21.11 - Fabric Loader 0.16.0+ - Fabric API - Java 21+ - Internet connection (required for PrimeTiers data retrieval) NOTE: This mod depends Ukulib to work! ## Installation 1. Download the latest release from the [Releases](https://modrinth.com/mod/primetier-tagger/versions) page. 2. Install the required dependencies: - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [UkuLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib) 3. Place the `.jar` file in your `.minecraft/mods` folder. 4. Launch Minecraft with Fabric Loader. 5. Join a server and enjoy PrimeTiers integration. ## Configuration The mod creates a config file at `.minecraft/config/primetier-tagger.toml`: ```toml enabled = true gameMode = "sword" showRetired = true highestMode = "NOT_FOUND" showIcons = true playerList = true retiredColor = -6105345 provider = "PRIMETIERS" [tierColors] HT1 = -1525190 HT3 = -483494 HT2 = -3877913 LT1 = -2772139 HT5 = -7372120 HT4 = -8293222 LT3 = -3769534 LT2 = -6248526 LT5 = -10134663 LT4 = -10134663 ``` ## Minecraft version support - Currently supported versions: 1.21+ through 1.21.11 Future version support: once Mojang switches to the new versioning system next year, the last 4 minor releases will be supported. During the transition phase (until 26.4), 1.21.1 and 1.21.11 will remain supported. ## API Integration - This mod integrates with the PrimeTiers API to fetch real-time player rankings, tiers, regions, and gamemode statistics. - Data is retrieved automatically and cached locally to reduce API requests while keeping information up to date. ## License Copyright © 2026 PrimeTiers All Rights Reserved. This software is proprietary and closed-source. You may download and use this mod for personal use only. You may not: - Redistribute this mod - Modify or decompile this mod for redistribution - Reupload this mod to other websites - Use any assets or source code without permission For permissions or inquiries, contact the PrimeTiers Team. ## Contact & Support * **Promotions, Partnerships & Sponsorships** – Join the PrimeTiers Discord: https://discord.gg/kWRHVzq3k2 * **Mod Development & Minecraft Services** – https://discord.gg/XyGUN6SEGq * **Website Development, APIs & Custom Projects** – https://discord.gg/c8cECQKSC3 ## Credits * **PrimeTiers Team** – PrimeTiers integration, API, ranking system, and tier data * **[Tiers Mod](https://github.com/mctiers-dev/TierTagger)** – Inspiration for HUD display, player lookup features, and gamemode icon systems * **[UkuLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)** by **[uku](https://modrinth.com/user/kuku)** – Utility library used by this mod * **Fabric API** – Fabric modding framework * **All Contributors** – Testing, feedback, and development support
## 💖 Made with Love PrimeTier Tagger is built with passion for the Minecraft community.

If you enjoy this plugin, please:

⭐ Leave a review on Modrinth
💬 Join our Discord community
🔗 Share with other server owners

Thank you for using PrimeTier Tagger!

Made with ❤️ by sylegendop1 | dev.yuvraj

Building the future of Minecraft PvP tiers, one player at a time.
